templates.name: kubernetes-core-high-signal
templates.purpose: Find high-engagement completed core Kubernetes bugs for deterministic candidate scoring.
templates.query: repo:kubernetes/kubernetes is:issue is:closed reason:completed label:"kind/bug" comments:>=8 sort:updated-desc
guardrails: Require reason:completed so resolved behavior is documented.
Require comments threshold to avoid low-signal one-off reports.
Keep sort stable and record query execution date in run notes.

templates.name: ingress-autoscaler-targeted
templates.purpose: Target ingress and autoscaler production regressions with enough discussion for evidence extraction.
templates.query: (repo:kubernetes/ingress-nginx OR repo:kubernetes/autoscaler) is:issue is:closed reason:completed label:"kind/bug" comments:>=6
guardrails: Restrict to repos in current execution wave.
Require kind/bug label to avoid feature requests.

templates.name: security-impact-keyword
templates.purpose: Capture completed issues likely to map to critical impact categories.
templates.query: is:issue is:closed reason:completed ("denial of service" OR outage OR "data loss") comments:>=5
guardrails: Use impact keywords only as seed, never as final severity assignment.
Require human review for category and severity mapping.
Record source URL and reproduction evidence for promoted candidates.

templates.name: regression-backport
templates.purpose: Prioritize issues with clear fix and version evidence useful for CCVE provenance.
templates.query: is:issue is:closed reason:completed (regression OR backport OR "fixed in") comments:>=5
guardrails: Require fix-reference text or linked PR evidence in body/comments.
Prefer issues with explicit affected/fixed version notes.
Reject candidates without reproducible impact statements.
